alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a phosphonic acid that is diesterified with alkyl groups, and the phosphorus atom is also directly attached to an alkyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Dialkyl alkylphosphonates

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing phosphonic acid ester functional group,  with the general structure ROP(=O)OH (R = organyl group).
alternative_parents.name: Phosphonic acid esters

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the phosphorus atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organophosphorus compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and an oxygen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organooxygen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a chemical bond between a carbon atom and a chlorine atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organochlorides

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the alkyl chloride functional group with formula R-Cl , where R is an alkyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Alkyl chlorides

class.description: Organic compounds containing phosphonic acid or a derivative thereof.
class.name: Organic phosphonic acids and derivatives

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as bisphosphonates. These are organic compounds containing two phosphonate groups linked together through a carbon atoms.

direct_parent.description: Organic compounds containing two phosphonate groups linked together through a carbon atoms.
direct_parent.name: Bisphosphonates

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic compounds containing two phosphonate groups linked together through a carbon atoms.
subclass.name: Bisphosphonates

superclass.description: Compounds an organic acid or a derivative thereof.
superclass.name: Organic acids and derivatives
